title: Lennar Stock Moves Higher on Dividend Hike
text: The shares of Lennar Corporation (NYSE:LEN) are up 2.4% to trade at $110.56 at last check, after the home construction company increased its annual dividend by 50% to $1.50 per share.

title: Lennar Hikes Dividend By 50%
text: Lennar Corp (NYSE: LEN) said its Board of Directors had increased its annual dividend by 50% to $1.50 from $1.00 per share. The move has resulted in a quarterly cash dividend of $0.375 per share for Class A and Class B common stock.
